function.name: read_file
function.description: Read the contents of a file in the project directory.

path.description: The relative path to the file to read.

function.name: write_file
function.description: Create a new file or overwrite an existing file with the provided content.

path.description: The relative path to the file to write.

content.description: The content to write to the file.

function.name: list_dir
function.description: List the contents of a directory.

path.description: The relative path to the directory to list (default is root '.').
